MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alejandra Lopez is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502 B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of SEP-10-2012 is vacated.
